_doc: Post-ask-resolved state — models the CONSEQUENT tool calls (create_circuit + record_reading) that happen AFTER an ask_user is answered. Does NOT exercise the ask_user round-trip itself; that's locked by the blocking-ask-user Phase 3 tests (stage6-ask-integration, stage6-dispatcher-ask, stage6-overtake-classifier suites) plus the F21934D4 replay test in Plan 04-04. Scenario: inspector said 'Circuit six Zs nought point three two.', the model asked 'Circuit 6 isn't on the schedule — create it, and what's the description?', the inspector answered 'Upstairs sockets', and we pick up HERE — both paths emit create_circuit(6,'Upstairs sockets') followed by record_reading(6,measured_zs_ohm,'0.32') in one round. Fixture name was sample-03-ambiguous-circuit.json before Plan 04-07 r1 remediation of Codex MINOR #4, which flagged that the old _doc claim of 'end-to-end ambiguous-circuit coverage' was misleading given the ask_user round-trip was elided. Renamed here so the name no longer overclaims. A proper round-trip fixture (ask_user + answer + create_circuit + record_reading in sequence) is tracked for Phase 5's STT-11 full 20-session exit check.
_post_ask_scope: This fixture starts AFTER an ask_user has fired and been answered. It exercises the WRITE dispatcher only (no ask registry, no ws fan-out). The divergence harness intentionally does not wire the Phase 3 ask registry; that's a separate integration surface covered by stage6-ask-integration.test.js. See Plan 04-07 r1 'Deferred Items' for the Phase 5 round-trip follow-up.
_requirement: STT-11 + STQ-02 category 3 + STS-03 (create_circuit dispatcher) + STS-01 (record_reading dispatcher).

pre_turn_state._doc: Schedule has circuits 1-4 only. Circuit 6 does NOT exist — this is what production would have triggered an ask_user on; in this fixture both paths jump directly to the create+record sequence.

transcript: Circuit six, Zs nought point three two.

sse_events_legacy._comment: Legacy post-resolution — record_extraction emits both a circuit_updates[create(6)] and extracted_readings[(6,zs,0.32)].

sse_events_tool_call._comment: Round 1 — two tool_use blocks: create_circuit(6) then record_reading(6,zs). Dispatcher requires the circuit to exist on the snapshot before record_reading runs; stage6-dispatchers-circuit.js dispatchCreateCircuit mutates session.stateSnapshot.circuits[circuit_ref] synchronously, so the second dispatcher sees the new circuit in the same round.
